parameters.query:
SELECT id, manufacturer, model, chemistry, nominal_kwh, usable_kwh, voltage, cycles, arch, raw
FROM batteries
WHERE ($1 = '' OR manufacturer ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%' OR model ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%'
                OR chemistry   ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%' OR arch   ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%')
  AND ($2 = '' OR arch = $2)
ORDER BY manufacturer, model
LIMIT $3

parameters.jsCode:
const detail = $input.first()?.json?.message || 'Error consultando Postgres';
return [{ json: { ok: false, reason: 'db_error', detail } }];
